name: Uoriki Co., Ltd.
summary: Uoriki Co., Ltd. engages in the retail, food and drink, and wholesale businesses in Japan and internationally. The company is involved in the retail of fresh fish and sushi products; and wholesale of fish and other products to supermarkets, restaurants, etc. It also operates restaurants. The company was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Tachikawa, Japan.
